title: Routing hint. Attach to a /sys/routes/* node.

wildcard.title: When true, this route catches descendant URL paths (e.g. /sys/routes/t catches /t/anything).

prefix.title: Tree path prefix this route mounts. Empty/absent → URL maps 1:1 to tree path.

index.title: Default child name when URL rest is empty (e.g. 'index').

public.title: When true, route renders for unauthenticated users (no global login modal).
